title: Closed Workspace for Pro Account
excerpt: I don’t understand why having a closed workspace isn’t available for pro accounts.  $16/seat/month doesn’t get me this simple feature?  I have to inquire about an enterprise plan for this feature?  I don’t get it.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t understand why having a closed workspace isn’t available for pro accounts. $16/seat/month doesn’t get me this simple feature? I have to inquire about an enterprise plan for this feature? I don’t get it.

posts.author: Richard02 (Richard Emmer)
posts.cookedHtml: Once joining, they have access to all Main boards within that workspace, and any Private/Shareable boards they’ve been invited to. Any team member subscribed to a board from a closed workspace will have access to that board but will not be able to see anything else within the workspace.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, but I’m not talking about boards, I’m talking about workspaces.
